title: Peyritschia bealii

This plant has been traditionally used in medicine to treat various health issues, including respiratory problems and skin conditions, due to its anti-inflammatory and antioxidant properties. The bioactive constituents of Peyritschia bealii include flavonoids, phenolic acids, and terpenoids, which contribute to its medicinal properties. Peyritschia bealii is commonly used to make herbal teas, infusions, and tinctures, which are believed to provide relief from coughs, sore throats, and skin irritations.
